title: rubus × pseudoprolongatus
intro: Rubus × pseudoprolongatus, a hybrid of the black raspberry and the purple raspberry, is a plant species known for its medicinal properties. It contains anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been found to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudoprolongatus include its potential to protect against cancer, cardiovascular disease, and cognitive decline, as well as its ability to support immune function and digestive health. Rubus × pseudoprolongatus can be consumed as a supplement, made into a tea, or used in herbal preparations such as jams, jellies, and tinctures.
